description: Carry your laptop to the office in style with this messenger bag from timberland. Show off your support for conservation of nature and encourage others to join your effort. Made from organic fabrics, this messenger laptop bag from timberland speaks volumes of your eco-friendlypersonality.Height: 41 cmWidth: 13 cmDepth: 31 cmCapacity: 17 litresMade of 50% recycled fibers like polyester and wool to help reduce environment impact Designed to resist water penetrationOne internal padded laptop compartment One internal organiser pocketPadded shoulder strap for easy carryExternal sleeve on the back to carry the bag in your handsSnap closures for tight FitPremium nubuck leather trim for added touch of sophisticationCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
